verdict_reasoning: LYN (Lck/Yes novel tyrosine kinase) is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored exclusively to the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. It has no TM domain, no GPI anchor, and no outer-leaflet lipidation. Its physical association with surface receptors (BCR, FcεRI, CD19, CD40) occurs entirely on the cytoplasmic face. No documented outer-leaflet surface display was found under any cell state, including cancer or cell death contexts. It is inaccessible from the extracellular face.
